description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a modern-traditional blend, featuring a prominent gable roof with multiple peaks and a mix of white and brick-textured exterior walls. The front facade includes a double garage, a covered porch supported by columns, and a main entrance with double doors. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, with large rectangular panes on both floors, and the rear of the house features a spacious patio area. The landscaping includes a driveway, a walkway, and a few decorative shrubs. The roof is steeply pitched and dark-colored, contrasting with the lighter walls. The overall design suggests a comfortable, upscale family residence typical of contemporary American neighborhoods.
description: A large, two-story suburban house with a gable roof, white and brick exterior, double garage, and symmetrical window rows. Features a covered front porch and landscaped driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance with covered porch, brick accent wall, and driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended driveway, side windows, and the depth of the house structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spacious patio area and symmetrical window arrangement on both floors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, driveway extension, and landscaping elements.
attribute_entryway_design: Double front doors under a covered porch with columns, brick accent, and a wide driveway leading to a double garage.
